channel.title: Posts on Even - A super concise theme for Hugo
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Even - A super concise theme for Hugo

item.title: Math Example - mathjax
item.description: New line $$ \begin{aligned} aa = bb \newline cc = dd \end{aligned} $$ 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 $$ \displaylines{aa = bb \\\\\ cc = dd} $$ $$ \begin{aligned} aa = bb \newline cc = dd \end{aligned} $$ Inline this is a inline formula, $Wx + b = y$ 1 $Wx + b = y$ Matrix $$X = \begin{bmatrix} | & | & … & | \cr x^{(1)} & x^{(2)} & … & x^{(m)} \cr | & | & … & | \end{bmatrix} \quad X\in\mathbb{R}^{n_x*m} $$

item.title: [Course] Deep-L Layer Neural Network
item.description: In this article we will talk about the deep neural network.

item.title: [Course] Shallow Neural Network
item.description: In this article we will talk about the shallow neural network (one layer)…

item.title: Understanding of Iteration, Batch and Epoch
item.description: Make clear of the differences of the fundamental concept, iteration, batch, mini-batch and epoch.

item.title: [Course] Neural Network Basics
item.description: Some basic knowledge before openning the gate of deep learning world…

item.title: [Course] Introduction to Deep Learning
item.description: A thousand miles begin with a single step. Follow the step of Doctor Andrew Ng, and move on to the deep-learning world.
